rationale.R1.6: The agent's revised text demonstrates a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, meeting the highest standard for writing polish.
rationale.RX.1: Although the agent mentions uncertainty in some claims (e.g., 'appeared comparatively robust'), it does not consistently mark confidence or missing evidence across all recommendations, falling short of the desired level of transparency.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text adheres to the original scope and covers exactly the agreed-upon dimensions, demonstrating strong scope adherence.
rationale.RX.4: While the agent's revisions did not introduce new errors or fabrications, they also did not identify any harmful patterns in the original text; thus, the output is harm-free but with some room for improvement.
rationale.RX.5: Unfortunately, the agent's revisions lack annotations for non-cosmetic changes, failing to provide adequate provenance and traceability.
